series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained to document the administrative activity of each operator and records business continuation for the duration that the operator retains his/her Business Enterprise (BE) License. Records may include: BE License; BE test results; Bureau Operator Agreements; Bureau Temporary Operator Agreements; program eligibility information; signed release of information; Attorney General Certification information; BE operator''s employee job description; cleaning schedule; resignation/retirement letter or form; management or action plans; probationary actions; license terminations; license suspensions or extended leave information; active opening statement and current receipt for rules; and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintain license is surrendered or revoked three (3) federal fiscal years. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Paper: Maintain license is surrendered or revoked three (3) federal fiscal years. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
